overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Last of Us showing a character exploring an abandoned, decaying hotel lobby with ornate classical architecture and a large domed skylight. The environment features overgrown vegetation, scattered debris, and dramatic natural lighting filtering through windows, creating a post-apocalyptic atmosphere.

agents.ego_description: walking through narrow corridor toward the doorway leading to the lobby

notable_agents.action: companion Ellie standing in the doorway, then moving aside to let Joel pass

entered.detail: decorative stone door frame with classical molding leading to the lobby
ornate wall-mounted light fixture on the deteriorating wall
peeling paint and water-damaged plaster on the corridor walls

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a narrow, decaying corridor with peeling plaster walls. The character approaches an ornate doorway frame leading to a brighter space ahead, with a wall sconce visible on the right. Ellie stands in the doorway ahead before moving aside.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand abandoned hotel lobby with domed skylight

events.description: exits narrow corridor and enters the large open lobby space
lighting brightens dramatically as natural light from the domed skylight fills the space

agents.ego_description: walking into the grand lobby and surveying the decaying interior architecture

entered.detail: large ornate glass dome ceiling allowing natural light to filter into the lobby
long marble reception counter with glass display cases on top
tall framed portrait hanging on the wall in a gilded frame
grass and small plants growing through cracks near the windows
ornate hanging light fixture suspended from the ceiling

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the corridor into a vast, sunlit lobby with a dramatic domed skylight overhead. The space features a large reception desk to the right, overgrown vegetation near the windows, and scattered debris across the ornate carpet. Natural light illuminates the decaying grandeur of the historic interior.

events.description: companion Ellie runs ahead toward the elevator area independently

agents.ego_description: walking toward the back wall and elevator doors while surveying the room

notable_agents.action: Ellie running ahead toward the elevator doors, exploring independently

entered.detail: metal elevator doors with call buttons on the side, set into the back wall
upholstered sofa with debris scattered on and around it
papers, books, and rubble strewn across the carpeted floor

segments.scene_description: The character continues across the lobby toward the back wall where elevator doors are visible. Ellie runs ahead to explore the area near the elevator. The reception desk recedes into the background as the character approaches a sofa and scattered debris near the back wall.

scene_state.functional_zone: lobby center looking back toward entrance

events.description: character turns around to survey the lobby and look back toward the entrance area

agents.ego_description: turning around and looking back at the lobby architecture, surveying the space

notable_agents.action: Ellie walking near the arched windows on the right side, exploring the perimeter

entered.detail: tall arched windows with curtains allowing natural light to enter
the doorway through which the character entered, now visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character turns around near the elevator to survey the lobby, looking back toward the entrance. The reception desk is visible again from a new angle, and arched windows on the right side allow streams of natural light to illuminate the dust and decay. Ellie explores near the windows on the right.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a claustrophobic, decaying corridor into the expansive, sun-drenched grandeur of an abandoned hotel lobby. It begins within a narrow hallway of peeling plaster, moving toward an ornate doorway where Ellie stands before stepping aside to reveal a brighter space. As the camera emerges from the corridor, the scene opens into a vast lobby illuminated by a dramatic domed skylight, with a large reception desk and overgrown vegetation flanking the debris-strewn carpet. The movement continues across the ornate floor toward the back wall and elevator doors, causing the reception area to recede as the character approaches a sofa and scattered wreckage. Finally, the camera pivots near the elevators to survey the entire hall, looking back toward the entrance while streams of natural light filter through arched windows to illuminate the dust and decay.
